title: W-class space barge
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''W-class Space Barge''' was a large kind of spaceship. The [[W-23 Star Hauler]] was one of the model.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}}
